title: Hoenn & Beyond Reactive Music
description: A collection of Pokémon music for Cobblemon from the Hoenn region and beyond.
body:
![Hoenn & Beyond Reactive Music logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25df665626671de91321e927a219bbda823ae4aa.png)

# Hoenn & Beyond Reactive Music
### A collection of music for Cobblemon from the Hoenn region and beyond

Return to Hoenn with this songpack created for the Reactive Music mod that replaces all music with **92** tracks primarily styled after Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire. The music will react to events and locations in-game with native support for some Cobblemon addons and modpacks.

### Features
- Unique tracks that change based on biome and if a player is underwater or underground.
- Location based music for all boss fights.
- Town/Village music that adjusts based on biome.
- Pokémon Center and PokéMart music that plays when near a supported building.
  - _A generic enough selection to support most builds._
- Special tracks played when a player is near their set spawn.
- Certain tracks set to only play during day or night.
- Music support for dimensions (The Nether and End).

### Supported mods
- [Cobblemon Additions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-additions) datapack
  - Pokémon Center music
  - PokéMart and Department Store music
  - Academy music
- [Cobbleverse](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobbleverse) modpack
  - Gym music for modpack unique gyms
- [Cobblemon Raid Dens](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonraiddens) mod
  - Special music when inside a raid den

### Requirements
- [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) is not required for this pack but recommended.

### Credits
- Most tracks are from official Pokémon titles with additional tracks styled after ORAS by [bauerklos](https://www.youtube.com/@aza3ful1).
